currentLinkedIn.headline: Demand Generation Manager at Clearbit | B2B · ABM · HubSpot
currentLinkedIn.about: I build demand-generation programs that fill pipeline and close revenue. Five years in B2B SaaS marketing — always with one eye on the funnel and the other on the attribution model.

experience.title: Demand Generation Manager
bullets: Grew MQL volume by 65% in 18 months through a mix of paid search, intent data, and webinar programs
Built ABM campaign targeting 300 named accounts; influenced 22% of new ARR in FY24
Established marketing attribution model in HubSpot that gave sales clear pipeline source visibility

experience.title: Marketing Specialist
bullets: Managed paid LinkedIn and Google campaigns with $40K/month budget; maintained 3.2x ROAS
Produced 12 gated content assets per year that collectively generated 1,800 leads
